title: VDD: ADVERSARY_SYSTEM_PROMPT and VERIFIER_SYSTEM_PROMPT are 60+ lines of hardcoded English in Rust source
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Documentation and Intent / Structural Modularity. Location: src/vdd/mod.rs:55-116. Violation: Two multi-dozen-line string literals embedded in Rust source. They cannot be edited without recompiling. They cannot be A/B tested at runtime. They cannot be localized or versioned independently of the binary. They drift silently from the user-visible behavior described in the module doc. The output_style.rs and skills.rs modules already load prompts from external markdown files — VDD prompts should follow the same pattern. Mandated Refactor: Move to prompts/vdd/adversary.md and prompts/vdd/verifier.md. Use include_str! at module level with a const (matches modes/fragments.rs pattern). Bonus: allow config override via vdd.adversary.system_prompt_path so users can customize. Test that the files compile to valid non-empty strings.
